sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n62514" key="leptomh/lh" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λεπτο-μήλη</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n62514.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">slender probe, Hermes</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">38.282</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
